title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedder in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API; integrates easily with Spring & Android.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, pull, and delete models from Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI enhancer for Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copplet for VS Code; local, private, no subscription.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with C# 12 async streams; chat, generate, and list models in .NET apps.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for chatting with local Ollama models; supports markdown and code blocks.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module example that spins up Ollama in a container for CI-based LLM tests.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with your PDFs offline.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as injectable services with Swagger docs out of the box.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial but feature-complete Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside your notes via Ollama.
